query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vpn_connections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  nasId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  connectionType ENUM('public_ip', 'vpn_pptp', 'vpn_sstp') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('connected', 'disconnected', 'connecting', 'error') DEFAULT 'disconnected' NOT NULL,
  localVpnIp VARCHAR(45),
  remoteIp VARCHAR(45),
  serverIp VARCHAR(45),
  uptime INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastConnectedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  lastDisconnectedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  disconnectCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastError TEXT,
  lastErrorAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  bytesIn BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  bytesOut BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
